channel.title: StudyFlow - Focus. Move. Repeat.
channel.description: A Pomodoro-style study timer with mandatory workout breaks. Stay focused, stay healthy.

item.title: StudyFlow Home
item.description: Start your focus and workout cycles. Set focus time, workout duration, and select videos.

item.title: Focus Session
item.description: Deep work in progress. Your workout awaits after this session.

item.title: Workout Break
item.description: Stand up and move. Follow along with your selected workout video.

item.title: Daily Summary
item.description: View your daily focus and workout summary with hourly timeline.
